bugs.title: Router.isHome() returns false with 0 pages
bugs.expected: isHome() should return true when there are no pages

notes: All tests passed. Tested empty/zero-length inputs for all components, FocusManager/Router with 0 items, width=1 and width=10000, ProgressBar edge cases, Box/Spacer boundaries, wrapText edge cases, and degenerate VirtualTerminal sizes.
